# Purpose
This file is a deprecated C header file that was previously used to define the function `sniprintf`. The file is no longer in use and has been replaced by `overrides/default/stdio.h`. The comment indicates that the functionality provided by this file has been superseded, and users should refer to the new header file for the current implementation.
